CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Continued To Jun-04-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Chanfe Venue
Off Calendar Mar-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT DEL MONTE CORPORATION's Motion To Change Venue is Granted. Venue is transferred to Stanislaus County pursuant to CCP 397(c). Transfer promotes convenience of witnesses and the ends of justice. (After hearing, the court signed the order that was submitted with the moving papers.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
